message:
feat(signal): add injectable time source to GracePeriodGuard

GracePeriodGuard used Instant::now() for started_at, remaining(), and
is_elapsed(), making grace period behavior untestable without sleeping.

Changes:
- Add time_getter field and with_time_getter() constructor
- remaining() and is_elapsed() delegate to new _at() variants
- Add remaining_at(now) and is_elapsed_at(now) public methods
- Add time_getter() accessor
- Convert grace_period_guard test from thread::sleep to deterministic
  clock advancement with exact assertions at 0ms, 40ms, and 150ms
- Convert grace_period_guard_started_at_accessor to use custom clock
- Add grace_period_guard_remaining_and_elapsed_at test for the _at() API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
